strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at current role aligns with required AI agent development
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing and Selenium)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work dates back to 2014-2018
Cloud platform experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth detailed beyond self-hosted

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well past the 6+ year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB experience and current hands-on work in AI agents and MCP code generators, which maps closely to the role's stack and AI requirement. Gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest) and somewhat dated secondary-language exposure (Kotlin/Java), but the breadth of languages, architecture experience, and testing discipline suggest strong adaptability to the team's primary stack.
